corrections.text: The summary states the line "began contract deliveries June 1." That specific date does not appear in the article body or in any of the cited accessible sources (Utility Dive, Energy Central, Wikipedia). What the sources establish is that the line reached commercial operation ahead of schedule (S&P Global's report is dated mid-May) when operation had not been expected until June; the precise contract delivery-start date is not verified here.

The first-year contract strike price of $97.50/MWh is attributed to S&P Global, which was inaccessible (HTTP 403) to verification and is not corroborated in the accessible Energy Central republication. The figure could not be independently confirmed.
